name: journal-club
description: Paper review presentation for journal club (15-30 min)

slides.content_focus: Paper title, authors, journal, year, presenter name
slides.notes: Include full citation. Highlight journal impact factor if relevant.
One-sentence summary of what the paper does and why.

slides.content_focus: What was known before this study, knowledge gap
slides.notes: Set the stage. Why was this study needed?

slides.content_focus: Study design, population, exposures, outcomes, analysis
Primary results, key table or figure from paper
slides.notes: Reproduce or summarize the key finding. Include effect sizes and CIs.
Highlight surprising or important secondary findings.
What did the authors do well? What is novel about this work?
Critical appraisal. Identify biases, confounders, design issues.
How does this change practice? Who benefits?

slides.content_focus: Questions for group discussion, unresolved issues
slides.notes: Prepare 3-5 discussion questions for the group.

slides.content_focus: Key related references, suggested further reading
